sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16654" key="a)stroku/wn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-κύων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], κύνος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n16654.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the dog-star,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
